verses.king_james: Make a joyful noise unto the Lord, all ye lands.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jubilate Deo, omnis terra ;  servite Domino in lætitia.  Introite in conspectu ejus in exsultatione.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִבְד֣וּ אֶת־יְהֹוָ֣ה בְּשִׂמְחָ֑ה בֹּ֥אוּ לְ֝פָנָ֗יו בִּרְנָנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sing joyfully to God, all the earth: serve ye the Lord with gladness. Come in before his presence with exceeding great joy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Palvelkaat Herraa ilolla: tulkaat hänen kasvoinsa eteen riemulla!
verses.king_james: Serve the Lord with gladness: come before his presence with singing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Scitote quoniam Dominus ipse est Deus ;  ipse fecit nos, et non ipsi nos :  populus ejus, et oves pascuæ ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דְּע֗וּ כִּֽי־יְהֹוָה֮ ה֤וּא אֱלֹ֫הִ֥ים הֽוּא־עָ֭שָׂנוּ (ולא) [וְל֣וֹ] אֲנַ֑חְנוּ עַ֝מּ֗וֹ וְצֹ֣אן מַרְעִיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Know ye that the Lord he is God: he made us, and not we ourselves. We are his people and the sheep of his pasture.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tietäkäät, että Herra on Jumala: hänpä meidän teki, ja emme itse meitämme, kansaksensa ja laitumensa lampaiksi.
verses.king_james: Know ye that the Lord he is God: it is he that hath made us, and not we ourselves; we are his people, and the sheep of his pasture.

verses.latin_vulgate: Introite portas ejus in confessione ;  atria ejus in hymnis :  confitemini illi.  Laudate nomen ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֹּ֤אוּ שְׁעָרָ֨יו ׀ בְּתוֹדָ֗ה חֲצֵרֹתָ֥יו בִּתְהִלָּ֑ה הוֹדוּ־ל֝֗וֹ בָּרְכ֥וּ שְׁמֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Go ye into his gates with praise, into his courts with hymns: and give glory to him. Praise ye his name:
verses.finnish_biblia: Menkäät hänen porttiinsa kiitoksella, hänen esihuoneisiinsa veisulla: kiittäkäät häntä ja ylistäkäät hänen nimeänsä!
verses.king_james: Enter into his gates with thanksgiving, and into his courts with praise: be thankful unto him, and bless his name.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam suavis est Dominus,  in æternum misericordia ejus,  et usque in generationem et generationem veritas ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־ט֣וֹב יְ֭הֹוָה לְעוֹלָ֣ם חַסְדּ֑וֹ וְעַד־דֹּ֥ר וָ֝דֹ֗ר אֱמוּנָתֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: For the Lord is sweet, his mercy endureth for ever, and his truth to generation and generation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra on hyvä, ja hänen laupiutensa pysyy ijankaikkisesti, ja hänen totuutensa sukukunnasta sukukuntaan.
verses.king_james: For the Lord is good; his mercy is everlasting; and his truth endureth to all generations.
